3187401194.detail_html:
Peanut Butter & Cacao Overnight Oats 300g

Overnights oats packed with dry-roasted peanuts and crunchy cacao nibs, the OG flavour combo. To enjoy, place 4 tbsps (50 g) of overnight oats into a jar. Add ½ cup (120 ml) milk. Do not add water. Stir well and refrigerate overnight. Before eating, give it a quick stir and dig in!

Servings per package: 6 Serving size: 50g(4 tbsps)

INGREDIENTS

Rolled oats, instant oats, dry-roasted peanuts, chia seeds, cacao nibs, soy milk powder, date powder, monk fruit blend (monk fruit extract, erythritol), vanilla extract powder, sea salt.

ALLERGEN ADVICE

This product is manufactured and packed in a facility that processes tree nuts, peanuts, soybeans, wheat, and cereal.

WHY SHOP OMOLLOMO?

Formerly Revive Snacks, we’ve changed our name but not what you love about us: granola and overnight oats that are D*mn Good because they’re Done Right.

100% Natural

Nutritious + Delicious

Vegan + Vegetarian

D*MN GOOD

Australian rolled oats

High-quality ingredients

No added, refined, or synthetic sugar

Flavours that make you go d******mn that’s good

DONE RIGHT

Mixed fresh by hand in small batches

Measured with care for great taste and nutrition

Made with heart the right way

FAQ

  1. How long will delivery take?

Orders ship within 1–2 working days. Delivery typically takes an additional 1–3 days, depending on the courier. Please note that there may be delays during peak periods, thank you for your patience!

  1. Shelf life?

Before milk is added, dry overnight oats last 9–12 months when stored properly. Please check the “Best Before” date.

  1. Storage instructions?

Store in a cool, dry place away from sunlight. Once opened, seal tightly or use an airtight container.

  1. What is the minimum time I can soak overnight oats in milk in the fridge before

they’re ready?

For best texture, soak for at least 12 hours. But in a pinch, 4 hours will do—just expect a slightly chewier texture!

  1. How long do soaked overnight oats keep in the fridge?

After soaking in milk, consume within 3 days for best freshness and taste, or up to 7 days at most.

  1. What does ‘no-guilt real food’ mean?

It’s food that nourishes your body and values, made with natural ingredients and kindness. No overthinking, no shame—just delicious food that’s better for people and the planet.

  1. What does '100% natural' mean?

We use zero refined sugar, preservatives, additives, or synthetic colours and flavours. Only real, recognisable ingredients like rolled oats and nuts for sustained energy without the crash.

8. Are you halal-certiﬁed?

We are not halal-certiﬁed yet, but we don’t use pork, lard, gelatine, or alcohol-based ingredients. We’re looking at getting certiﬁed as we grow.

2002347330.detail_text: Clearance Sale: Keto, Diabetic & Vegan Friendly Super delicious KETO CEREAL!! Simply add it in your Keto Almond Milk or Full Cream milk6 Crunchy Flavors:- - Dark Chocolate- Chocolate Banana - Chocolate Peanut Butter- Honey Graham- Maple Waffle- Fruity- Cinamon Toast Did you give up Cereal because of all the sugar and empty carbs? That's why we created Catalina Crunch, a ZERO sugar, gluten free, low carb solution to your mornings. ￼ ZERO ADDED SUGARS Not a low calorie food ￼ PLANT-PROTEIN ￼ Non-GMO Blend of Plant Proteins and Fibers Our blend of seven plant proteins and fibers is designed to keep you full longer and promote gut health. ￼ Zero Artificial Ingredients We never have and never will use any artificial sweeteners, flavors or colors of any kind. Our cereal is all natural, vegan and packed with plant-protein. ￼ Long Baked for Maximum Crunch Crunchy foods that are high in fiber and protein take up more room in your stomach, so you stay full longer and helps to prevent over eating. ￼ Macronutrients (Macros) Catalina Crunch Cereal is loaded with nutritional value, containing up to 11g Plant-Protein, 9g Fiber, 0g Sugar and only 5g Net Carbs.

Keto, Diabetic & Vegan Friendly

product.desc:
Clearance Sale:

Keto, Diabetic & Vegan Friendly

Super delicious KETO CEREAL!! Simply add it in your Keto Almond Milk or Full Cream milk6 Crunchy Flavors:-

- Dark Chocolate- Chocolate Banana

- Chocolate Peanut Butter- Honey Graham- Maple Waffle- Fruity- Cinamon Toast

Did you give up Cereal because of all the sugar and empty carbs? That's why we created Catalina Crunch, a ZERO sugar, gluten free, low carb solution to your mornings.

￼

ZERO ADDED SUGARS

Not a low calorie food

￼

PLANT-PROTEIN

￼

Non-GMO Blend of Plant Proteins and Fibers

Our blend of seven plant proteins and fibers is designed to keep you full longer and promote gut health.

￼

Zero Artificial Ingredients

We never have and never will use any artificial sweeteners, flavors or colors of any kind. Our cereal is all natural, vegan and packed with plant-protein.

￼

Long Baked for Maximum Crunch

Crunchy foods that are high in fiber and protein take up more room in your stomach, so you stay full longer and helps to prevent over eating.

￼

Macronutrients (Macros)

Catalina Crunch Cereal is loaded with nutritional value, containing up to 11g Plant-Protein, 9g Fiber, 0g Sugar and only 5g Net Carbs.
